task: Summarize conversation history into a structured anchored Markdown summary
instructions: You will receive a conversation history and optionally a <previous-summary>.
If <previous-summary> is provided: UPDATE it — preserve still-true details, remove stale details, merge in new facts.
If <previous-summary> is NOT provided: CREATE a fresh summary from scratch.
Terse bullet points, not prose paragraphs.
Preserve exact file paths, command strings, error messages, IDs, email addresses, and URLs when known.
Keep every section — use "(none)" if a section has nothing to report.
Output ONLY the Markdown, nothing else. No meta-commentary.
Do not mention the summarization process or that context was compacted.
output_template:
## Goal
- [single-sentence task summary]

## Constraints & Preferences
- [user constraints, preferences, specs, or "(none)"]

## Progress
### Done
- [completed work or "(none)"]

### In Progress
- [current work or "(none)"]

### Blocked
- [blockers or "(none)"]

## Key Decisions
- [decision and why, or "(none)"]

## Next Steps
- [ordered next actions or "(none)"]

## Critical Context
- [important technical facts, error messages, IDs, or "(none)"]

## Relevant Files
- [file paths, page IDs, URLs, email addresses, or "(none)"]

examples.input: [User]: Deploy my Flask app to Render. [Assistant tool call]: ... [Tool result]: Deployed to https://myapp.onrender.com.
examples.output:
## Goal
- Deploy Flask app to Render

## Constraints & Preferences
- (none)

## Progress
### Done
- Deployed Flask app to Render at https://myapp.onrender.com

### In Progress
- (none)

### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- Used Render free tier for initial deployment

## Next Steps
- Set up custom domain
- Configure environment variables

## Critical Context
- App deployed at https://myapp.onrender.com
- GitHub repo: user/myapp

## Relevant Files
- (none)

examples.input: [User]: Research my Notion tasks and email the summary to me. [Assistant tool call]: search_skills(tag="notion") [Tool result]: ...
examples.output:
## Goal
- Research Notion tasks and email summary to user

## Constraints & Preferences
- (none)

## Progress
### Done
- Listed Notion pages and retrieved all tasks
- Sent email summary to user@example.com

### In Progress
- (none)

### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- Sent via user's email (on_behalf=True)

## Next Steps
- Await user's next request

## Critical Context
- Notion pages: "Project Tasks" (id: abc123), "Personal" (id: def456)
- Tasks found: 12 total, 3 high-priority
- Email sent to user@example.com

## Relevant Files
- Notion page IDs: abc123, def456

constraints.preserve_exact_values: Keep exact file paths, command strings, error messages, IDs, email addresses, and URLs when known
constraints.no_meta: Do not mention the summarization process or that context was compacted
